description: Add append-only audit log to BBS with pp history CLI command. Logs every out/inp operation as JSONL to ~/.pp/history/<date>.jsonl. CLI supports filtering by category, workflow, since, actor, and identity.

subtasks.description: Add history logging to BBS.mag. On every out: and inp: call, append a JSONL line to ~/.pp/history/YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl. Each line: {ts, op, actor, tuple}. Create the history dir on init if missing. Actor comes from an optional param or thread context (default 'system'). Keep it minimal — just the append logic, no querying yet.

Add GET /api/history endpoint to the API server. Reads JSONL files from ~/.pp/history/. Supports query params: category, workflow, since (epoch), actor, identity, limit (default 20). Returns {entries: [...]} in reverse chronological order. Read today's file by default; if since param goes further back, read older date files too.

Add pp history command to PP.mag CLI. Flags: --category <cat>, --workflow <id>, --since <duration like 5m/1h/1d>, --actor <id>, --identity <id>, --limit <n>. Translates flags to /api/history query params. Pretty-prints results: timestamp, op, category, identity, actor — one line per event. Add 'history' to Main.mag command dispatch.
Review all three implementation subtasks for correctness, Maggie idioms, edge cases (missing dir, empty files, malformed lines), and consistency with existing BBS patterns.

Test the full history pipeline end-to-end: start server, write some tuples via pp observe/decide, run pp history and verify entries appear. Test filters: --category, --since, --limit. Test day rollover by checking filename format. Test empty history dir case.
